title: Media and advertising
explanation:
Media and advertising

  • brand, slogan, campaign, target audience, review
  • influence, promote, recommend, advertise
  • phrases: go viral, catch attention

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The company launched a new advertising ____ last month. | *campaign | receipt | qualification
That short video went ____ on social media overnight. | *viral | formal | balanced
A good advert needs to ____ the audience's attention. | *catch | refund | arrest
Teenagers are the main target ____ for this product. | *audience | platform | symptom

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: I read an online ____ before buying the headphones. | review
Celebrities can strongly ____ what people buy. | influence
The poster is meant to ____ the new app. | promote
A memorable ____ helps customers remember the brand. | slogan
That sports company has become a global ____. | brand

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Many businesses use social media to ____ their services. | *advertise | memorise | replace
I would definitely ____ this podcast to language learners. | *recommend | clarify | delay
The headline was designed to create instant ____. | *interest | compensation | habit
questions.feedback: Media headline aims to attract interest.

questions.text: The message was simple but highly ____. | *effective | judicial | renewable
